details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page, used JavaScript DOM extraction to pull actual table data (not hallucinated), and reported complete results for the 3 most recent years: 2025 (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis), 2024 (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton), and 2023 (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier). The 2023 and 2024 data matches known Nobel Prize records. The extraction methodology confirms real browsing occurred.
